diagram_title: 0 — 組裝betas: produce anthropic-beta header value
purpose: Given (model, auth, provider, env) inputs, produce an ordered list of beta flag strings that is byte-equivalent to upstream claude-code v2.1.112 ZR1 output for the same inputs.
viewpoint: developer maintaining wire-fingerprint parity with claude-code

activities.title: 解析 模型 predicates
activities.description: Compute 是haiku, supports1MContext, supportsThinking, supports上下文management 來自 模型id.

activities.title: 解析 env conditions
activities.description: Translate process.env reads 進入 已解析 booleans 於 呼叫 site (provider.ts), then pass 進入 組裝betas 作為 plain options.

activities.title: Apply 依-flag conditional pushes 在 upstream order
activities.description: Walk 9-步驟 push ladder; each 步驟 independently consults its predicate(s) 與 pushes (或 不).
mechanisms: assembleBetas() body — structurally arranged push ladder

activities.title: 追加 env-supplied flags
activities.description: 追加 items 來自 envBetas[] verbatim 到 end 的 清單. Skipped if empty.

activities.title: Deduplicate while preserving order
activities.description: Remove duplicates that arise 來自 envBetas overlap. Order 的 first occurrence preserved.

to_spec.requirement: Requirement 4 (push order), Requirement 5 (MINIMUM_BETAS removed), Requirement 7 (reserved slots)
